name: OpenTripPlanner
description: A multimodal router combining OSM and Public transport tables.

name: Open Source Routing Machine
description:
A new fast routing service for car
covering the world.

name: VROOM
description:
Vehicle Routing Open-source Optimization Machine
It's aim at providing good solutions to various real-life vehicle routing problems (VRP) within a small computing time.

name: Nop's
description: Dedicated routing for hiking and horseback riding with multiple targets. Dynamic route options e.g. for following marked hiking routes or weather conditions. Options to modify caculated route manually, download or print it.

name: Agilogik GmbH
description: Worldwide tile server and services for commercial use.

name: uNav
description: Map viewer and GPS navigator for Ubuntu Phone.

name: TargomoAPI
description: Targomo offers routing-based analysis tools - isochrone polygons, points-of-interest, routing, reachability, fleet management, statistics reachability.

name: מפילרי
description: מאגר תמונות ברמת הרחוב במיקור המונים

name: OsmAnd
description:
Navigation (routing) offline and online, OSM and custom map display (vector data or tiles, offline, cached or online), POI and address search (offline or online Nominatim), submit OSM bugs and POI, mark favorites, public transport info. Actively being developed.

Keywords: GPS navigator, GPS navigation, navigation system, satellite navigation, sat nav, satnav, GPS tracker, GPS tracking, GPS map, OpenStreetMap, OSM viewer, map viewer, OSM mapping, offline routing, offline world map, global offline country maps, outdoor.

name: StreetCritic
description: Routing for cyclists that uses both user and algorithmic ratings to calculate routes and visualise streets.

name: A Better Routeplanner
description: A route planner for planning trips and charging with a Electric Vehicle.

name: Bike Citizens
description: Bike Citizens is a navigation app designed for and by cyclists, offers offline routing, predefined tours and various routing profiles.

name: OpenRouteService
description: Route navigation based on osm data and TMC for car, bike and pedestrian.

name: Ride the City
description: Bicycle routing based on OSM data. Coverage: Selected big cities (currently 42) in U.S., Canada, Australia, France, Spain, few cities in other countries.

name: QGIS
description: מערכת מידע גיאוגרפית, מבוססת על קוד פתוח וחופשית
דף פירושונים

name: BRouter
description: BRouter: Let's get serious about bike routing. BRouter offers routing for trekking and cycling with predefined profiles and the ability to modify and upload custom profiles.

name: FacilMap
description: Different OSM renderings, search and draggable routes, create custom maps with live collaboration where markers, lines, routes and GPX/KML/GeoJSON/OSM files can be added.

name: BBBike
description: Routing focused on bikes (no. of traffic lights, height profile, lit, road surface, …).

name: RouteYou
description: Routing based on osm data for several recreational modes walking, hiking, cycling, horse riding, motorcycle,...

name: Naviki
description: Planning bicycle trips and routing and collecting GPS traces.

name: Mapzen Turn-by-Turn (Valhalla)
description: Worldwide routing by automobile, bus, foot, and bicycle.

name: CycleStreets
description: Bicycle routing and planning and photo map based on OpenStreetMap data and the OpenCycleMap for the British Isles. API available.

name: GraphHopper
description: Fast routing for bikes, pedestrians and cars with worldwide coverage. Using the open source routing engine GraphHopper.

name: JOSM
description: Offline highly expandable map editor.

name: KOMOOT Routing
description: Calculate routes for mountain bikes, touring bikes and hiking taking your fitness level and elevation into account.

name: Kurviger
description: Routing and navigation specialised for motorcycles. Kurviger calculates curvy routes that are fun to ride on bike. Curves and slopes are preferred, while cities and highways are avoided. Generate loop trips with one click. Personalise the routing to your own riding style.

name: GraphHopper Direction Api
description: Fast routing service including a powerful Matrix and Route Optimization API based on the open source routing engine GraphHopper.

name: routing.osm.ch
description: Routing with Leaflet slippy map for pedestrians (two types), cyclists (two types) and cars in Switzerland only (based on OSRM).

name: brouter.grade.de
description: Inland waterway routing (Europe) taking size of vessel into account. Based on Brouter router-software.
